category_title: Students who exhibit verbal outbursts when frustrated by prescriptive reading tasks
scenario_title: Resistance to deficit labels during a writing prompt
minimal_context: On the first day of a remedial reading intervention class, the student is asked to respond to a writing prompt about how she feels about being in the class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For our first day, please respond to the writing prompt on the board: 'How do you feel about being in this reading class?'

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don’t remember signing up for this class!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just write down your thoughts about it on your paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I shouldn't be identified as a struggling reader. I am a learner.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: People have said that this class is for slow people and I’m not slow.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For our first day, please respond to the writing prompt on the board: 'How do you feel about being in this reading class?'

STUDENT: I don’t remember signing up for this class!

TUTOR: Just write down your thoughts about it on your paper.

STUDENT: I shouldn't be identified as a struggling reader. I am a learner.

TUTOR: Please just answer the prompt.

STUDENT: People have said that this class is for slow people and I’m not slow.

task.content: Responding to a class writing prompt 'How do you feel about being in this reading class?'

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Identification as a struggling reader and placement in a class perceived to be for 'slow people'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Protesting her placement and shunning the deficit label in her writing
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Resistance to deficit labels, repositioning herself as a learner
related_quotes: I don’t remember signing up for this class!
People have said that this class is for slow people and I’m not slow.

behavior_patterns.condition: When placed in a remedial reading intervention class
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Protesting placement verbally and writing resistance to the label
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Defining themselves in relationship to deficit labels and repositioning themselves as learners through resistance
related_quotes: I don’t remember signing up for this class!
